_README: WorldState obstacle template for Phase 3. The two obstacle components below register through the erh:vmodutils module and present on the API as grippers, so they show up in resource_names as grippers. Add them to the `components` array of your machine (or the imported fragment). Replace every REPLACE_WITH_MEASURED value using GetEndPosition over the real workspace. Pose z is the CENTER of the box: half its height. The table sits below world z=0, so its z is negative half-thickness.
